selected_wedge_hypothesis: Export only the current Chrome window to a clean, share-ready CSV in one click.
decision_rationale: The research loop sharpened the wedge from generic tab export into a specific current-window CSV job.
Evidence quality and testability stayed strong, and wedge clarity improved materially.
That sharper wedge now overlaps too directly with the existing tab_csv_window_export portfolio, so the candidate should not build.
